subject: COAS Web Brief - May 18, 2026
paragraph:
AI GENERATED - 

Across the College of Arts and Sciences web presence, the Department of ************** is driving outsized traffic this week, logging **,*** sessions to lead all departments ? yet that momentum is partially offset by a mobile performance score of ** against a target of **, meaning a significant share of those visitors may be encountering a subpar experience on the devices most of them are using. With *,*** broken links still active across the site and both accessibility and SEO scores sitting at **, ****** points below the peer average of **, the College is leaving measurable ground on the table in search visibility and inclusive access. The web team's priority heading into the coming days is closing that mobile gap and accelerating link remediation, two moves that would have an immediate, compounding effect on every department's ability to compete for prospective students and research audiences online.
priorities:
- Broken links (****) above/below critical threshold ? export from Siteimprove and assign to departments
- Accessibility (**) above/below peer average (**) ? one sprint to close the gap
- Mobile score (**) above/below target (**) ? focus: responsive images and navigation
- Engagement rate (**%) below average ? audit top landing pages for content clarity and CTAs
note: Reminder: Meeting with Firstname Lastname, Wednesday afternoon, adding considerations from Firstname Lastname to conversation.
